item.title: Welcome
item.description: This is my public design & UX research notebook.

item.title: Comparative Analysis
item.description: “How can we provide personalized user experiences in shared mobility services using SDV and AI technologies in a fully autonomous (Level 5) future?” In the future, car ownership is expected to decrease, and autonomous shared mobility, where strangers share rides like public transportation will becom...

item.title: Future Scenario Development
item.description: 3.4.1 Urban and Technological Context (2040) This study assumes a society in the year 2040 where fully autonomous vehicles are widely used, and shared mobility services are a natural part of everyday urban life.
